rationale: Gov't Code §2306.045 governs administrative hearings for penalties under §2306.041. It has norelation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: Sec. 2306.045. HEARING. (a) If the person requests a hearing before the State Office of Administrative Hearings or fails to respond in a timely manner to the notice, the director shall set a hearing and give written notice of the hearing to the person.
_note: No conflict exists; the cited rule addresses SOAH hearing procedures for housing-finance penalties, unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
